isa: PIPELINED (16/32 gl in wmma span); WMMA+LDS; ~236 VGPR (<256), 0 spill; PLRAB=300 VGPR-wall
authority_benchmark: local-only (NO whole-prefill promotion; DBUF regresses in-model per Phase B)
stop_reason: representation emittable; full speed needs register pool (PLRAB VGPR-walled)
learned_rule: the schedule_template (K-loop software pipeline) IS EMITTABLE via build_gemm_lds2 DBUF (PIPELINED, correct, no-spill, ~236 VGPR) -- the representation exists. But the Tensile-CLASS depth (full A+B prefetch) hits the 256-VGPR static wall, and DBUF alone regresses in-model -> the SPEED match requires a register POOL (register_lifetime representation), confirming PREFILL_FULL_SPEED_SEARCH_STILL_DEFERRED.
